javaScript

/**
 * Auto-generated code below aims at helping you parse
 * the standard input according to the problem statement.
 **/

const n = parseInt(readline());
const d = parseInt(readline());
const h = parseInt(readline());

// Write an answer using console.log()
// To debug: console.error('Debug messages...');

let nbsurvie = h / 24 * n ;

if (nbsurvie == d )
console.log('Just enough');
else if (nbsurvie > d)
console.log('It is enough');
else 
console.log('Not enough');

<?php
/**
 * Auto-generated code below aims at helping you parse
 * the standard input according to the problem statement.
 **/

fscanf(STDIN, "%d", $n);
fscanf(STDIN, "%d", $d);
fscanf(STDIN, "%d", $h);


 
 $nbsurvie = $h / 24 * $n ;
 
 if ($nbsurvie == $d )
 echo 'Just enough';
 else if ($nbsurvie > $d)
 echo 'It is enough';
 else 
 echo 'Not enough';
 

import sys
import math

# Auto-generated code below aims at helping you parse
# the standard input according to the problem statement.

n = int(input())
d = int(input())
h = int(input())

# Calculate total survival time with available apples and required survival time
total_hours_needed = d * 24
total_hours_available = n * h

# Determine survival status
if total_hours_available > total_hours_needed:
    print("It is enough")
elif total_hours_available == total_hours_needed:
    print("Just enough")
else:
    print("Not enough")
